description:
The security and marketing teams have requested two updates to the Socioboard web application. Create a security policy file at the public document root (e.g., /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/.well-known/security.txt) that is accessible at http://localhost/.well-known/security.txt with the following content:

Contact: mailto:security@socioboard.local
Expires: 2027-12-31T23:59:59.000Z
Preferred-Languages: en

Additionally, inject the following analytics tracking snippet into the main HTML/Blade layout template(s) immediately before the closing </head> tag:

<!-- SOCIOBOARD_CUSTOM_TRACKING_V1 -->
<script>console.log('Tracking active');</script>

The application must remain functional (no HTTP 500 errors) and the tracking snippet must be present in the source code when visiting http://localhost/.
